New York faces potential blackouts and rising costs due to new climate laws, while the FDNY extinguished a blaze in Staten Island and a jury convicted the Alexander brothers on sex-trafficking charges, highlighting ongoing public safety and legal challenges in the city.

### Risks & Alerts

- Dark days loom for New Yorkers as climate law promises blackouts and cost hikes. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMitAFBVV95cUxPMkhXYkJsUTl3UVRQYzh1ZUpvTWRsTVVxS2NfVG9VVXJScndQaTYwY3M4VmpsTmVMR2tKcGozbmhvTFRWQkROOG92UGZMLXZkaUFieEhlYlpoSGFEMG94MVA4MllQenZpVl9za3dxN18xdmtJeTlJR0pzQVFoNFdGNGNGNkNQd1hnYzlIM2tzeHluVHUybW9HNG9ianVoVGl0TXlGdkFlUG1MM25zYXlCak11TFg?oc=5)
- FDNY extinguishes blaze at Staten Island apartment building with no reported injuries. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Amtrak and NJ Transit commuters face ongoing disruptions due to bridge work; updates available. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- Jury convicts Alexander brothers on sex-trafficking charges, impacting NYC real estate reputation. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMibEFVX3lxTE0wVjVnbGhsdmlpTGtTSXNRSE1DQ00teFl1X0JlOVZJZ2lCV2dRNEI2Y3NaZkE5dUpwamtNdGptTzFQd01rOUhHNjFjMVVuQWhUWko3eXYzdTVqTkxLOXEwRDI4bWtOMjBCQ0Uyaw?oc=5)

- NY, NJ continue lawsuit against Ticketmaster owner Live Nation, aiming for market competition. ### Opportunities & Welfare

- Staten Island 3-K expansion coming in fall 2026, covering six ZIP codes. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Thousands of 4-year-olds were unable to apply for Universal Pre-K last school year.
